name: Sambai-zu (Rice-vinegar and Soy Dipping Sauc
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rice vinegar, niban dashi, sugar, soy sauce, and salt in a small saucepan.
2. Stir until the ingredients are well mixed.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature before using.
